enable_audio_notes.description: Enables or disables speech-to-text note creation.

enable_ar_view.description: Toggles the availability of the Augmented Reality view.

enable_qr_scanner.description: Toggles the availability of the QR code scanning mode.

max_note_length.description: The maximum character limit for notes.

highlight_note_color.description: The color used for highlighting markers and active UI elements.
